assets.name: Flat permaculture soil base with painted 2D green grass texture and gravel walkways.
Integrated vertical greenhouse structure with glass panels and timber frames fitted within the concrete skeleton.
Industrial solar panel array on a tilted metal mount.
Set of three color-coded recycled plastic compost and waste bins.

analysis.reasoning: Demolishing a reinforced concrete structure of this size would incur massive costs and high carbon emissions. The existing concrete frame is ideal for supporting heavy hydroponic systems, vertical trellises, and rainwater harvesting tanks. By keeping the 'bones', we save on structural materials.
analysis.building_condition: Abandoned reinforced concrete skeleton, two floors, exposed rebar, structural integrity appears stable but unfinished with significant weed growth at the base.

green_solution.description: Repurposing the abandoned concrete shell into a multi-level permaculture hub. The ground floor will serve as a mushroom cultivation and composting center, the second floor for hydroponic leafy greens, and the rooftop for solar energy and rainwater collection.
green_solution.waste_management: Existing wooden scaffolding debris will be chipped into mulch for the garden beds. Exposed rebar will be treated and used as climbing structures for vine-based vegetables like passion fruit or beans.

gemini_full_report.image_gen_prompt: A photorealistic landscape view of an abandoned concrete building shell transformed into a lush vertical permaculture farm. Vibrant green vines climbing concrete pillars, glass-enclosed greenhouse sections on the top floor, wooden planter boxes made from recycled materials, solar panels on the roof, and a clean gravel path around the base, soft cinematic daylight.

components_for_3d.to_generate: Flat permaculture soil base with painted 2D green grass texture and gravel walkways.
components_for_3d.scale_reasoning: This is the mandatory foundation layer. It is a completely flat geometry to serve as the ground plane for all other objects.

components_for_3d.to_generate: Integrated vertical greenhouse structure with glass panels and timber frames fitted within the concrete skeleton.
components_for_3d.scale_reasoning: The largest component. As the primary building, its scale [5.0, 4.0, 4.5] reflects a real-world size of roughly 15x12 meters, matching the footprint of the existing concrete carcass.

components_for_3d.to_generate: Industrial solar panel array on a tilted metal mount.
components_for_3d.scale_reasoning: A medium-sized object. In reality, a solar array is significantly smaller than a building but larger than furniture, hence the ~1.8m scale.

components_for_3d.to_generate: Set of three color-coded recycled plastic compost and waste bins.
components_for_3d.scale_reasoning: Smallest component. These bins are approximately 1/10th the height of the main building columns, matching real-world proportions.
